key_excerpts.text: Fractile's $220m round arrives as Anthropic eyes its UK silicon Accel led the London chip startup’s round, with Pat Gelsinger joining as an angel investor, weeks after Anthropic was reported to be in early discussions to become a customer. Fractile, the London-based startup designing inference chips that put compute and memory on the same die, has raised $220 million to take its hardware to production, the company said on Tuesday. The round closes above the $200 million reported target the company was understood to
